MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff and defendant counsels are sanctioned $250.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is not reset due to the proximity of the trial date. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Helen Lee Greenberg, Esq., for defendant and moving party: DHARMA REALM BUDDHIST ASSOCIATION, INC.
Kristen Ross, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Colette Seavey

After hearing, DEFENDANT DHARMA REALM BUDDHIST ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions are DENIED. Plaintiff's assertion that she has now answered the discovery, after being pro per for a time, was not disputed. Judge Richard Ulmer. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions

MINI MINUTES: Michael Blacksburg, Esq., Attorney at Law, Motion to be Relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF COLETTE SEAVEY. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, as moot. On December 8, 2009 pro per Seavey substituted into the case.
